title: GT-PBR
description: This texture pack adds the PBR effect in shaders.
body: This texture pack add PBR support for GTM, currently most blocks are supported, cover/machines textures will be supported in future. visual performance can be checked in gallary, suggested to be used with photon, or any other ray tracing shader, complementary and solas are not recommended. if you cant use it then unzip to use it
